rules.name: run format/lint/test before creating a PR
rules.evidence: run the following commands in that library's directory before creating a pull request

rules.name: no Sphinx-style double backticks in docstrings/comments (edit)
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (``code``). Use single backticks (`code`) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

rules.name: no Sphinx-style double backticks in docstrings/comments (write)
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (``code``). Use single backticks (`code`) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

always_on: TEST variable usage for running a particular test file or passing extra pytest options with make test
Repository is a monorepo; overview of libraries under libs/ (checkpoint, checkpoint-postgres, checkpoint-sqlite, cli, langgraph, prebuilt, sdk-js, sdk-py)
Dependency map showing which libraries are downstream of checkpoint, prebuilt, and sdk-py, and thus impacted by changes to them
